name: Black Cat Cupcakes
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cup Reduced Fat Oreo® cookie crumbs
18 1/4 ozs reduced fat chocolate cake mix
16 ozs reduced fat milk chocolate frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare 24-2 1/2 inch muffin cups with cooking spray and flour; set aside.
3. Prepare cake mix according to package directions; stir in cookie crumbs.
4. Spoon batter into prepared muffin cups.
5. Bake for 25 minutes.
6. Remove from pans; cool on wire rack.
7. Make cat faces on each of the remaining 24 cookies: using some frosting, attach 4-1 1/2 inch licorice strings for whiskers, 2 jelly bean halves for eyes and 2 chocolate chips for ears.
8. Let set at least 30 minutes.
9. Frost cupcakes with remaining frosting.
10. Stand cat faces on edge on each cupcake.
11. Place 3-inch piece of licorice string on back half of each cupcake for tail.
